name: @speedora/platform-fit
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Publishing Expansion Phase 7A (AI SEO - Platform-Fit Recommendation). Ranks Speedora's 9 SocialPlatform values for a clip by taking a weighted sum of its already-computed ClipScores 9-dimension breakdown (the frozen detect-clips LLM call's output) against one hand-authored weight vector per platform. No LLM call, no detector, no I/O - pure function only. See root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/api's ClipsService.getPlatformFit.
